item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: Photo by Ana Sofía on December 31, 2024. May be an image of 1 p...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Photo by Ana Sofía on December 31, 2024. May be an image of 1 person, hair, outdoors and text.

item.title: 2024– I CANNOT BEGIN TO EXPRESS MY GRATITUDE to every single per...
item.description:
View on Instagram


2024– I CANNOT BEGIN TO EXPRESS MY GRATITUDE to every single person that has supported me. It still blows my mind I’m able to do this. This year was a lot about building. Building new relationships, new friendships, new goals. 2025 is going to be madness. I wanted to share a bit of what doesn’t end up in the edits, because I mess up a lot hahahaha. Wishing everyone an incredible start to the new year 💚

View on Instagram


🚨 ANNOUNCING 🚨 @anasofiafehn Culinary Content Creator, Summit to Table - culinary experiences hosted by world renowned chefs Elevate your experience and attend Summit to Table events with 5850 Fest VIP Passes. Link to learn more in bio!

item.title: SHAKSHUKA 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


SHAKSHUKA 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper-Onion-Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes)-Garlic-Paprika-Coriander-Cumin seeds / ground cumin-Chili powder-Oregano -Salt -EggsToppings-Parsley-Mint-YogurtServe with some crusty bread or pita! #cooking #shakshuka #breakfast #recipes

item.title: Holiday Leftover Turkey and Potato Croquettes with Cranberry Dip...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Holiday Leftover Turkey and Potato Croquettes with Cranberry Dipping Sauce made entirely with @hexclad pans #hexcladpartnerFor the Croquettes-Cooked shredded or chopped turkey (you can also substitute another protein)-Mashed potatoes -Parmesan cheese-Egg-Garlic Powder-Onion powder-Salt -Black pepperFor the breading: -AP Flour-Eggs-Panko breadcrumb. -Oil for frying*season your flour and breadcrumbs for the best flavor For the cranberry dipping sauce-Fresh cranberries (or you can use leftovers if already made!)-Orange juice-Salt-Sugar-Rosemary-BalsamicTopped with crispy sage leaves and delicious with gravy as well!

item.title: Late night tacos for the family 🌮I didn’t know what to call them...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Late night tacos for the family 🌮I didn’t know what to call them because I wasn’t sure what they’d become as I cooked 🤓IngredientsFor the Shredded Beef-Beef flank steak-Canned tomatoes (or fresh roma tomatoes)-White or yellow onion-Garlic-Red wine vinegar-Cumin-Oregano-Ground cloves-Paprika-Bay leaves-Cinnamon stick-Salt -Black pepper-Water or beef brothFor the Avocado Crema-Avocados-Sour cream or greek yogurt-Garlic-Fresh lime juice-Cilantro-Jalapeño -SaltFor the Pickled Onions-Red onion-White vinegar-Water-Sugar-Salt-Black pepepercorns-GarlicTo assemble:-Corn tortillas-Cilantro-Onion-Melting cheese of choice (I used a blend of queso quesadilla, cheddar, and Monterey Jack) — mainly because that was what we had on hand haha but it was great! #tacos #holidays #dinner #recipes

item.title: Breakfast goals with @richardblais. 😍Gallo pinto with @mancityus...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Breakfast goals with @richardblais. 😍Gallo pinto with @mancityus fan @anasofiafehn kicks off our Let ‘Em Cook series, serving up dream PL mornings. 🇨🇷🧑‍🍳What’s your perfect PL breakfast? 🍳

item.title: LASAGNA VERDE 🌿INGREDIENTSFor the spinach pasta dough-fresh spin...
item.description:
View on Instagram


LASAGNA VERDE 🌿INGREDIENTSFor the spinach pasta dough-fresh spinach-Eggs-00’ flourFor the Ragù -Ground beef-Ground pork-Mortadella-Prosciutto-Celery-Onion-Carrot-Passata-Red wine-Beef stock-Salt and pepperFor the Besciamella:-Butter-AP or 00’ flour-Whole milk-Nutmeg-Salt For the Lasagna:-Layer: bolognese, béchamel, parmigiano, and pasta sheets#cooking #lasagna #bologna

View on Instagram


Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Soufflé inspired by @tresemme ‘s Total Volume Mousse #TRESPartner

item.title: Historically, all of my moves while living in Los Angeles have b...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Historically, all of my moves while living in Los Angeles have been extremely stressful, but this year I used @roadwaymoving and it was the smoothest moving process I could’ve asked for. In a mind-blowing feat, they packed and moved my entire apartment in a few hours. So excited to get to work in my new space! #moving #losangeles

item.title: MA!?! Tacos de Carne Asada 🌮IngredientsFor the Carne Asada-1 lb ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


MA!?! Tacos de Carne Asada 🌮IngredientsFor the Carne Asada-1 lb Skirt, Flank, or Flap Steak-3 tbs Extra Virgin Olive Oil-Juice of 1 lime -Juice of 1 orange-Minced garlic -Spices : paprika, cumin, adobo, salt, pepperFor the Repollo (purple cabbage slaw)-Finely cut/shredded purple or green cabbage-2 to 3 tbs fresh lime juice-1 tbs olive oil-Pinch of salt-Chopped cilantro (add to preference) For the guacamole-2 to 3 ripe avocados -Juice of fresh lime-1/4 c finely diced red onion-Chopped cilantro -Salt and pepper to taste-Add ins: roma tomato, jalapeño (We didn’t have it at the time)For the pickled red onions-1 red onion-1 c vinegar (white or apple cider vinegar)-1/2 c water-1 tbs sugar-1 teaspoon salt-Optional add-ins: garlic clove, bay leaf, peppercornsFor taco assembly-Corn tortillas-Cotija cheese-Pickled jalapeños #cooking #tacos #grilling #carneasada
